## Release Version

## Included Changes

## Pre-release Checklist

- [ ] All included issues have acceptance criteria.
- [ ] Required PRs are merged.
- [ ] Test scenarios are updated.
- [ ] Technical design is updated if behavior or architecture changed.
- [ ] Decision log is updated if major decisions changed.
- [ ] Telegram flow verified when affected.
- [ ] Line flow verified when affected.
- [ ] Google Sheets logging verified when affected.
- [ ] Environment variables documented when changed.
- [ ] Render deployment approval received.

## Test Evidence

## Known Limitations

## Deployment Notes

## Post-release Checklist

- [ ] GitHub Release created.
- [ ] Related issues closed or moved to follow-up.
- [ ] Project board updated.
